name: Grok Build

form_factor.comment: Terminal-native coding agent and CLI in early beta. Per-form-factor links: CLI: https://x.ai/news/grok-build-cli.

released_in.comment: xAI launch announcement for the early beta.

latest_major_update.comment: June 2026 updates added `/goal` for long-running autonomous execution, a plugin marketplace, an agent dashboard for parallel sessions, and Composer 2.5 model access in Grok Build.

rules.comment: Official launch page says AGENTS.md works out of the box. Location: `AGENTS.md` in repo tree.

skills.comment: Skills and plugin marketplace are called out in the launch page. Location: plugin/skill folders managed by Grok Build plugin marketplace; exact disk root not yet public.

hooks.comment: Hooks are explicitly listed as supported.

mcp_servers.comment: MCP servers work out of the box according to xAI. Location: MCP server configuration picked up from the repo/tooling; exact disk root not yet public.

custom_commands.comment: Plugin marketplace can bundle slash commands, but public docs reviewed still do not document a user-editable custom command folder.

goal_command.comment: Built-in `/goal` mode for long-running autonomous task execution with progress checklist and steering commands.

subagents.comment: Delegates larger tasks to specialized parallel subagents, with worktree integration.

monitor.comment: Public Grok Build docs reviewed here mention hooks/subagents but do not establish whether a Monitor-style background watch primitive exists.

model_selection.comment: Launch screenshot references config.toml for models and API keys; model catalog details are not yet public.

approval_mode.comment: Plan mode lets users approve, comment on, or rewrite a plan before execution.

sandbox_mode.comment: Worktree isolation is documented for subagents; broader filesystem/network sandbox controls are not yet documented.

resume.comment: No public resume/session-id documentation found in the launch page.

continue.comment: No public continue-latest command documentation found.

output_format.comment: ACP support implies structured protocol integration, but no JSON/stdout output format docs found.

telemetry.comment: No user-visible telemetry opt-out setting found in public launch docs.

hosted_agent.comment: Documented as a terminal CLI, not a managed hosted worker.

custom_model_provider.comment: Config references models and API keys, but arbitrary OpenAI-compatible provider support is not documented.

pricing.value: Included for SuperGrok and X Premium Plus subscribers during beta
pricing.comment: Early beta access is tied to paid xAI/X subscriptions.

notes: Early beta. Strong documented parity on AGENTS.md, skills, hooks, MCP, headless mode, ACP, and parallel subagents; lower confidence for session management and telemetry because public docs are still sparse.

transcripts.comment: Location: transcript/session disk storage is not documented in the public beta launch page.

keyboard_shortcuts.comment: Research needed. Check official documentation for keybinding customization options.

theme_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for theme/appearance customization options.

auto_save.comment: Research needed. Check for auto-save or session persistence features.

debugging_output.comment: Research needed. Check for debug mode or verbose logging options.

context_window.comment: Research needed. Check for configurable context length or token limits.

code_formatting.comment: Research needed. Check for formatter/linter integration or auto-format options.

git_integration.comment: Research needed. Check for git command support or version control integration.

performance_mode.comment: Research needed. Check for caching, optimization, or resource management settings.

ui_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for UI layout, sidebar, or panel customization.
